form.formComment: Finished second last start (30.33) at big odds over 525m at The Meadows. Drawn the inside. Others preferred.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Impressive performance showing plenty of speed to score by 3 lengths in a Grade 5 last start at this track, clocking a slick 25.40 over the 450m trip. Harder here but warrants respect on latest.

form.formComment: A slick 25.91 over the 460m trip. Expected to push the clock again here.

form.formComment: Has finished in the placings at last two, the latest when second (29.33) over 515m at Sandown. Squeeze draw to overcome. Cannot be ruled out.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 6 lengths over 525m at The Meadows in a handy (29.91), beating Rattler. Has a fast 25.39 PB at this course and distance. Among the chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to win last start by 6 lengths over 525m at The Meadows in a handy (29.91), beating Rattler. Has a fast 25.39 PB at this course and distance. Among the chances.

form.formComment: Didn't finish two back and couldn't make the frame last time when she finished 6th on April 13 over 450m at this track behind Paw Gusto beaten 8 lengths (25.71) in a Grade 4/5. Others favoured this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Faltered and tailed off in back straight.

form.formComment: Good win last start as odds-on favourite by 2.75 lengths over 450m at Ballarat in a handy 24.96, beating Paw Gertrude. Can measure up again.
